name: Baden-Wuerttemberg (Germany)

colors.symbolism: the historic colours of Swabia and the Hohenstaufen

description: Two equal horizontal stripes of black over gold (yellow).
history: Adopted with the formation of Baden-Wuerttemberg in 1952, by merger of Wuerttemberg-Baden, Wuerttemberg-Hohenzollern, and Baden. The colours derive from the arms of the medieval Duchy of Swabia.

features.symbolism: Black and gold are the historic colours of the Hohenstaufen dukes of Swabia, taken into the arms of the modern state.
